items.title: European Council conclusions set the current EU agenda
items.summary: EU leaders adopted conclusions covering Ukraine, competitiveness, defence, migration and democratic resilience.

items.title: Council hardens the Union's posture on hybrid threats
items.summary: The Council approved conclusions on hybrid threats, cyber activity and election interference.

items.title: Commission continues the competitiveness and climate push
items.summary: The Commission announced measures linked to competitiveness and the Clean Industrial Deal agenda.
